# After remove 40 (slide 119): e underflows and merges with left sibling d
# (pulling 30 down) -> [10,30]. That leaves b empty; b's sibling c cannot lend,
# so b and c merge pulling 50 down from the root a. The root becomes empty and
# is discarded, so the merged node becomes the new root.
#
#                    [50,75]                        new root
#                  /    |    \
#            [10,30] [60,70] [80]
root 2
2  2  5  50 6  75 8
5  2  0  10 0  30 0
6  2  0  60 0  70 0
8  1  0  80 0
